source_head_note: 68a395d is the PR head reviewed by Codex review 4628390626 before this follow-up repair. The post-repair validation target is recorded in post_repair_validation_attestation because a Git commit cannot contain its own final SHA inside an evidence file without changing that SHA.

post_repair_validation_attestation.repair_summary: Added github_merge_receipt.json, aligned merged-state proof links and inventory freshness, and tied the validation baseline to the latest reviewed head with this post-repair worktree attestation.
post_repair_validation_attestation.final_commit_sha_note: The final commit SHA is expected to differ from source_head_sha_at_validation because this evidence file is part of the repair commit.

evidence.command: cargo check && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo test -- --test-threads=1
Addressed Codex review 4628059435 comments r3521863094, r3521863097, r3521863102: freshness timestamps, no-sendable completed proof notification, and empty decision IDs for no open Human Decision.
Addressed Codex review 4628097832 comments r3521900195 and r3521900199: live no-open-decision skip receipt dry_run=false and refreshed inventory updated_at timestamps for modified proof artifacts.

Addressed Codex review 4628133314 comments r3521933057, r3521933058, r3521933062, r3521933068: inventory validation_report freshness, validation SHA, existing decision document path, and removal of literal legacy email address from review evidence.
Addressed Codex review 4628184582 comments r3521967679, r3521967681, r3521967686: validation SHA, PR #87 merged external PR receipt, and live skip receipt sent_at/webhook_source.

Addressed Codex review 4628252488 comments r3522018745, r3522018747, r3522018752, r3522018753: validation source head, merged-state merge/status proof, E2E receipt timestamp ordering, and current artifact_dir decision document path.

Addressed Codex review 4628328801 comments r3522083454, r3522083456, r3522083457, r3522083459: validation source head, merged-state rollback plan, live execution inventory freshness, and email literal secret scan coverage.

Addressed Codex review 4628390626 comments r3522130048, r3522130049, r3522130053: GitHub merge receipt proof, inventory timestamp freshness for changed artifacts, and post-repair validation attestation tied to latest reviewed head 68a395d.

Addressed Codex review 4628447442 comments r3522179428, r3522179429, r3522179435: v0 GitHub merge receipt shape, inventory freshness for live execution/implementation/human decision artifacts, and expanded GitHub token secret scan prefixes.

Addressed Codex review 4628478657 comment r3522212166: PR #87 has a one-parent GitHub merge result commit, so github_merge_receipt.json records merge_method=squash and rollback evidence refers to the squash merge result commit.
